subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Abha Beauty! The eloquent verses and the fluent musaddas, which are the fruit of your devoted poetic genius [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده جمال ابهی اشعار بلیغانه و مسدس فصیحانه که اثر قریحه عاشقانه آنجناب
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @humility; meekness; lowliness
